subparts.text: Explain the concept of retailer goodwill and its role in building customer trust and loyalty. 1
Write short notes on the importance of location in retail success. Mention two key factors retailers must consider when choosing a site. 2
Explain how celebrity marketing can influence consumer perception and purchase decisions. 2
Define retail analytics and discuss the significance in modern day retailing 1

A retailer wants to select the best site between Location A and Location B. It has identified three critical factors, each with a specific weight: Cost , Customer Accessibility , Competition Each location is rated on a scale of 1 to 10 for each factor. Using factor rating method suggest which location is best suited. Factors Weight Location A Location B Cost 0.40 8 7 Customer accessibility 0.35 9 8 Competition 0.25 6 7 1
Discuss the significance of a well-defined retail organization structure. Compare hierarchical vs. flat structures and explain how each can influence decision-making and employee engagement. 1
Explain creative advertising marketing and strategic marketing. How do they complement each other in achieving overall retail goals? Use examples to support your answer. 1
Define market basket analysis. How can retailers use the findings from market basket analysis to implement effective cross-selling strategies? Illustrate your answer with an example. 2
What are the key differences between house brands and name brands? Discuss the advantages and challenges retailers face when developing and marketing house brands. 2
Briefly describe how competitor threat analysis helps retailers maintain a competitive edge. 2
